---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Stalled Amid Protests and Legislative Activity"
date: 2026-07-21T10:35:28.971089+00:00
summary: "Opposition protests over student crackdowns halt Parliament as the NDA discusses strategy and the government tables key judicial and social legislation"
run_time_ist: "4:05PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:05PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> Both Houses were repeatedly adjourned as opposition leaders, led by Rahul Gandhi, protested the police crackdown on &quot;Cockroach Janta&quot; student demonstrators and demanded a formal discussion on the issue.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxNZVE2d3ROdHo0cDZERm9hblBiZ2dzcjRFUVV2M05oTHdPS2tZT3VuSFVPSUUxU3JYb25kNHZaVmliNzVSWjMzMXkyeE0tZkJhVTFDdmllTVZrR1RQYlZ4YzhhZWN1UDFPTGtHTEFCYUJxSlZaNWFNcGFXRzdpUGVsUFhpX0tmTTR1aVRyZGE5WFRIMnU0OTQxRQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxQNkFJSTlNYjZPaHdFazBoYzRSV1dKM1k3Sl81ZDZCeUVuMEJSd3dfWG05bzdkWXFYNGZKWnoybTZxUzdYLUhoSE5OUE1Hc2dVVXFzbG1YdUFsaXJaVmJlUW5RQnJUOERxOG1ZRzk3aTJNcS1hREduMVZTWFVkS1NCekFjcm5EY2I3TlJHbUk5TmVBZmc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I25</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative and legal shifts:</strong> The government introduced a bill to increase the number of Supreme Court judges, while the Rajya Sabha passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxPX0dnSDZsSWNibXl5a2FPN1A2X1pPZkVDVWpHOTJjOW14SVRVUjFjVUpCZmNtSlJVbklWWFN4c1NfY1NSazNzYzU5UjBkZjVGb0ZsYl9QQjI2RTlQX0pWT0R6TVU0X0FzLWY1UFlweGw2OW0yZnZQamtFbXFENU80T2tDbWYzMHg1Q0xSZXkyNlk3aURpc05FSHhuYUJ6SkJjSlE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Shiv Sena dispute:</strong> The Shiv Sena (UBT) has petitioned the Supreme Court to challenge the recent merger of six of its MPs with the Eknath Shinde-led faction.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I20</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>NDA strategy meeting:</strong> During the &#x27;Mangal Milan&#x27; meeting, Prime Minister Modi addressed the NEET paper leak controversy, labeling it a &quot;grave sin&quot; and a national concern while urging NDA MPs to support strict action against those responsible.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxNTlI0TTNkVDQ1TEpGQzJtalZoeDIyRHgwV0FzRFpMZHliVzRWSmY3Ul95dFVmV2xIb3hTY1VXY3dkeDNkczZ1Z3BWQjYtUzh6eEVJUmNMbXpBNGZLSzd3aWdObjM3OWF5TXljTkZrdm1SaFNJdnE5YldQUk5VcWJJVi1SV2p1QWZFWmRieTRuTURPY1ZjcnNpdmd4MHlmVzQxMTZtTjJxNEN2VDYwWEhV?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNNy14OFlqWFdPN09WYVZ6SVZ4NFVMeFB4WllScmIzeF9BV1dpMFRRVXBHNkhfT3ZPQVpXUlJ0bWljcUVlUHBQd0MyUkZTSW51UHBzRmdoSHdxLV9wbVNpbUc0Zklwb1NMYUtLMy1GMXRfRXFtR002bm9WaUZJX3VuRWotQm00MEFrYlNKeTVUbDhJSFdlQ0FqVHF1UjFMQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a></span></li>
</ul>

The crackdown has triggered protests beyond Delhi. #dwnews #CockroachJanta - facebook.com</a> facebook.com</li>
